content.en:
"Come in!"

Ye Tian stood on the earth of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and immediately used his copying talent to observe the surrounding situation.

There is no danger here, there are only a few special creatures around, which are very weak and not a threat.

There are no powerful creatures in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and the strongest creatures are only super perfect controllers, and they can't surpass super perfect controllers here.

The reason why this is the case is because of the hands and feet of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, so that the creatures of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm cannot break through to the Void Realm Perfect Controllers.

If the creatures here can break through at will, then with the help of such resources, maybe a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm will be born, so how can they still control the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm?

Not only that, but it was also difficult to cultivate in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, so the creatures here were all weak and could not pose a threat.

"Entering the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, the real threat is the other super-perfect masters. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, with his strength, he is naturally not afraid of other super-perfect controllers.

"There are countless resources in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and there are even Extreme Dao treasures like the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, and even Extreme Dao Treasures, according to what the Lord of Canggu said, in the previous few Extreme Dao Genius Battles, there were super perfect controllers who gained a lot of benefits, and after they came out, it didn't take long to break through to the realm of Immortal Perfect Controllers. Resources are only taken once in a long time, so it's full of resources now!"

Ye Tian was naturally very interested in these resources, if he could find enough Extreme Dao Golden Fruits or similar treasures, he would be able to break the Extreme Dao chains faster.

Of course, it would be even better if you could find a treasure like the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument.

"Let's find resources first, if you encounter an extreme creature, then kill it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Anyway, the Extreme Deep Sea and the End of the Realm are mortal enemies, and maybe one day, the Extreme Deep Sea will invade the End of the Realm again, so it is naturally a good thing to kill some more Extreme Path creatures.

And if you kill enough extreme creatures, you can also enter the killing list, and be on the killing list, and the end of the world will give benefits!

"The Black Cloud Gold Stone Vein, a good thing, can be used to refine the array weapon, and arrange a magic circle that is enough to threaten the super-perfect master!"

Ye Tian quickly took away this ore vein.

Next, Ye Tian found a lot of good things, some treasures were guarded by creatures in the Extreme Mangshan Realm, but these creatures were weak, and they could kill a lot with a wave of their hands.

Therefore, Ye Tian found a lot of resources in a short period of time.

"No wonder they all want to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, there are too many resources here, more than the resources of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, this does not mean that the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm is better than the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, but there are many Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and they have been collecting resources and consuming resources, even if it is a real treasure land, it has been scraping, and there are not many resources left.

And the biological intelligence of the Jimang Mountain Realm is not high, plus the creatures here do not have a complete inheritance, and many resources are not known, so there are so many resources here.

this day.

Ye Tian finally met other Extreme Dao creatures.

"Eighteen Extreme Creatures, it should be a team of Extreme Creatures!"

Ye Tian guessed.

These eighteen Extreme Dao creatures are not weak, after all, it is unlikely that the Extreme Dao creatures who dare to enter the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm are weak, and the weak will not dare to come in.

After all, the Extreme Path creatures do not have a second life, so the Extreme Path creatures that dare to come in are very powerful, and if these eighteen Extreme Path creatures join forces, even if the Lord of Time encounters them, they may not be able to escape.

Ye Tian didn't avoid these eighteen extreme creatures, and soon met them.

......

"It's a cultivator at the end of the realm, just a super-perfect controller, hahaha, we're so lucky, kill him and take away the resources he found!"

"I'll kill him, I want to hit the kill list!"

"It's a bit difficult to hit the kill list, but if you want to kill, you'll have to get fewer resources later. "

"Yes, it's decided!"

These eighteen Extreme Dao creatures seemed to have thought that Ye Tian was dead, so they began to divide the rewards there.

Rumble!!!

One of the extreme creatures who looked like a cat man made a move, killing Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

However, just as he was about to attack Ye Tian, an Extreme Dao Hand that was completely condensed by the power of the Spatial Extreme Dao instantly grabbed this Extreme Dao creature.

Then.

Click!

This very powerful Extreme Dao creature was pinched to death by Ye Tian, and his body was shattered and turned into ashes, leaving only some treasures in his body, which fell into Ye Tian's hands.

At this moment, the seventeen Extreme Dao creatures were all stunned.

One hit and second kill, even if they are seventeen of them together, they may not be able to do it, at least it takes a few moves.

After all, the one who had just made the attack was the most powerful Extreme Creature among them, more powerful than them.

"Run, this guy is the top super-perfect master at the end of the world, ask for support, let the more powerful Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Deep Sea kill him!"

These Extreme Creatures thought to themselves.

Immediately, they began to flee.

However, in Ye Tian's hands, they couldn't escape.

"Time Pole Dao Domain!"

In an instant, this area was covered by Ye Tian's Time Extreme Dao Domain, which was an Extreme Dao Control Technique that was used to exert the power of Dacheng's Peak Time Extreme Dao.

Even these Extreme Dao creatures couldn't break the Time Extreme Dao Domain, and they were all affected by the Time Extreme Dao Domain, unable to break free from the shackles of time.

To the outside world, it was as if they were frozen in time and slowed down.

"Extreme Teleportation!"

Ye Tian seemed to have turned into countless phantoms, and his speed was extremely fast, instantly penetrating the body of an extreme dao creature and killing it in seconds.

In the blink of an eye, all eighteen Extreme Path creatures fell.

"It's too weak, it's not a challenge at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took away the resources from these extreme creatures.

I have to say that they have collected a lot of resources, and if they keep killing like this, even if they don't look for resources, they can get a lot of resources!

"The Golden Belt of Murder and Treasure Hunting, the truth of the ordinary world, is still suitable for use here!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

And as he killed these eighteen Extreme Path creatures, he suddenly entered the killing list.

After all, not long after entering the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, he killed eighteen Extreme Dao creatures, so he could naturally rank on the killing list.

However, the names of the kill lists are changing too quickly these days, and they are constantly being refreshed.

Therefore, the list at this time is meaningless, and those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the outside world will not care about such a list, only after a period of time, the killing list will be stable and will not easily change again.
